part.partDescription: Low Profile Seat - Flame Stitched - XL '04-'22
part.bullet1: Solar-reflective leather in the seating area and automotive-grade vinyl on the sides; patented process reduces surface temperature by as much as 25°F for a cooler seat, higher durability and longer life over conventional leather or vinyl
part.bullet2: Seats' internal EZ Glide systems feature virtually no metal-to-metal contact with the backrest detent bars; bars are securely suspended in place using synthetic composites that virtually eliminate corrosion and wear
part.bullet3: Optional backrests feature solar-reflective leather cover and multiple detents with virtually no metal-to-metal contact for vertical and fore/aft pad adjustment (backrest is sold separately)
part.bullet4: Low-profile design with molded flexible urethane foam interior for improved seating position and maximum comfort
part.bullet5: 3/16" ABS thermoformed seat base for a perfect fit, and fully carpeted bottom to protect paint
part.bullet6: All backrests can be used in either position

part.bullet1: Solar-reflective leather in the seating area and automotive-grade vinyl on the sides; patented process reduces surface temperature by as much as 25°F for a cooler seat, higher durability and longer life over conventional leather or vinyl
part.bullet2: Seats' internal EZ Glide systems feature virtually no metal-to-metal contact with the backrest detent bars; bars are securely suspended in place using synthetic composites that virtually eliminate corrosion and wear
part.bullet3: Optional backrests feature solar-reflective leather cover and multiple detents with virtually no metal-to-metal contact for vertical and fore/aft pad adjustment (backrest is sold separately)
part.bullet4: Low-profile design with molded flexible urethane foam interior for improved seating position and maximum comfort

part.partDescription: Spring Solo Mount - FX/FL '66-'84
part.productName: Mount Kit for Spring Solo Seat
part.bullet1: Kit allows you to mount Drag Specialties Large or Small Spring Solo Seats with no modifications to the bike
part.bullet2: No welding required
part.bullet3: Adjustable front mount and complete instructions to ensure accurate installation
part.bullet4: Spring-mounting studs can be placed at 6" or 7" spacing center-to-center
part.bullet5: Includes 3" springs and all mounting hardware
part.bullet6: Bracket is .187" steel with black powder-coat finish; spring mount studs and 3/8"x16 threaded rod for mounting are made of stainless steel; mount centering spacers are made of aluminum
part.bullet8: Drag Specialties Small Spring Solo Seats will require hinge bracket part #DS-902013 (sold separately).

part.partDescription: Low Profile Touring Rain Cover
part.productName: Low Profile Touring and Double Bucket Seat Rain Cover
part.bullet1: Made of durable black 300 x 300 denier polyester fabric with a urethane coating and WRMR (Water-Resistant/Mildew-Resistant) finish
part.bullet2: Cover folds into its own pouch, and pouch is sewn into the rain cover so it is easy to locate
part.bullet3: Feature one loop on each side and comes with 4' of nylon and two barrel locks as adjusters for additional security if needed
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.
part.bullet5: For Low Profile Touring and Double Bucket seats w/ or w/o backrest

part.partDescription: 2-Up Predator Rain Cover - Black
part.bullet1: Made of durable black 300 x 300 denier polyester fabric with a urethane coating and WRMR (Water-Resistant/Mildew-Resistant) finish
part.bullet2: Cover folds into its own pouch, and pouch is sewn into the rain cover so it is easy to locate
part.bullet3: Feature one loop on each side and comes with 4' (1.22 m) of nylon and two barrel locks as adjusters for additional security if needed
part.bullet4: For all Drag Specialties 2-Up Predator, Predator III, and Solo front seats w/ Solo rear seat combination w/ or w/o backrest

part.partDescription: Tour Pak® Filler Pad - Relocator Kit Gap - Smooth - FLT/FLH

part.bullet1: Backrests features one lower detent that plugs into the seat and remains stationary, seat does not adjust up and down

part.partDescription: Bobber Solo Seat - Double Diamond - Red Stitch - '10-'22 XL

part.bullet4: Lower position creates better rider position with improved styling

part.partDescription: 3/4 Solo Seat - Low - Basketweave - FXD/FLD '06-'17
part.bullet1: Solar-reflective leather in the seating area and automotive-grade vinyl on the sides; patented process reduces surface temperature by as much as 25°F for a cooler seat, higher durability and longer life over conventional leather or vinyl
part.bullet2: 3/16" ABS thermoformed seat base with carpeted bottom and rubber bumpers to protect paint
part.bullet3: Lower profile with molded polyurethane foam interior for maximum comfort
part.bullet4: Approximate 6" high step for additional support
part.bullet6: Made in the USA
part.bullet7: Seats mount to the center hole on the rear fender. Certain models and '06-'08 years may not have the center mount hole. If your model year does not have the center mount hole in the fender, you will need to drill your fender and install the nut kit that is included with the seat.
part.bullet8: These seats will not fit '04-'06 XL models due to the location of the ECM.

part.partDescription: Solo Seat - Mild Stitched - Driver's Backrest - FXD/FLD '06-'17
part.productName: Solo Seat with EZ Glide II™ Backrest Option
part.bullet1: Solar-reflective leather in the seating area and automotive-grade vinyl on the sides; patented process reduces surface temperature by as much as 25°F for a cooler seat, higher durability and longer life over conventional leather or vinyl
part.bullet2: Lower profile with molded polyurethane foam interior for maximum comfort
part.bullet3: Rubber bumpers and fully carpeted bottom to protect paint
part.bullet4: 3/16" ABS thermoformed seat base for a perfect fit

part.partDescription: Low Touring Seat - Pillow - FXD/FLD '06-'17
part.bullet1: Solar-reflective leather in the seating area and automotive-grade vinyl on the sides; patented process reduces surface temperature by as much as 25°F for a cooler seat, higher durability and longer life over conventional leather or vinyl
part.bullet2: Seats' internal EZ Glide systems feature virtually no metal-to-metal contact with the backrest detent bars; bars are securely suspended in place using synthetic composites that virtually eliminate corrosion and wear
part.bullet3: Optional backrests feature solar-reflective leather cover and multiple detents with virtually no metal-to-metal contact for vertical and fore/aft pad adjustment (backrest is sold separately)
part.bullet4: Low-profile design with molded flexible urethane foam interior for improved seating position and maximum comfort
part.bullet5: 3/16" ABS thermoformed seat base for a perfect fit, and fully carpeted bottom to protect paint
part.bullet6: All backrests can be used in either position

part.partDescription: Solo Seat - Mild Stitched - Driver Backrest - FLH '97-'07
part.productName: Backrest Compatible Solo Seat — Mild Stitched
part.bullet1: Solar-reflective leather in the seating area and automotive-grade vinyl on the sides; patented process reduces surface temperature by as much as 25°F for a cooler seat, higher durability and longer life over conventional leather or vinyl
part.bullet2: 3/16" ABS thermoformed seat base with carpeted bottom to protect paint
part.bullet3: Flexible urethane foam interior for maximum comfort
part.bullet4: Lower rider 1/2" from stock seat
part.bullet6: Requires a 1/2" hole to be drilled in the fender.

part.partDescription: Low Forward Touring Seat - Double Diamond - FLHR/FLHX '97-'07
part.productName: Forward Positioned 2-Up Low Profile Touring Leather Seat
part.bullet1: Low-profile double bucket seat with solar reflective leather in seating area and automotive-grade leather-like vinyl on the sides; features improved shape and molded flexible urethane foam interior for added comfort
part.bullet2: 3/16" ABS thermoformed seat base for a perfect fit, carpeted bottom and rubber bumpers to protect paint
part.bullet3: Seat moves rider forward 2" compared to stock seat; this may vary depending on model and year
part.bullet4: Driver area is cut narrow in the front to help eliminate pressure on the inner thighs
part.bullet5: Includes all mounting hardware and instructions
part.bullet6: Optional EZ Glide II backrest sold separately

part.partDescription: Extended Reach Predator III Seat - Vinyl/Solar Leather - Smooth - FLT/FLH '23-'25
part.bullet1: Predator III 2-Up extended reach seat extends the drivers seating area back 2"
part.bullet2: Features 6-1/2" tall driver support with unique styling
part.bullet3: The seating area is contoured for maximum comfort
part.bullet4: The seat is made narrow up front for better leg clearance
part.bullet6: 3/16” ABS thermoformed seat base for a perfect fit, fully carpeted bottom, and rubber bumpers to protect paint
part.bullet7: All hardware is fastened to the seat with instructions included

part.partDescription: Fairing Pocket Lining Kit
part.bullet1: Easy-to-install kit includes everything needed to line fairing compartments with a soft, thick, durable fabric
part.bullet2: Pliable, stretchable material fits easily into the tight corners of compartments for a professional fit and finish
part.bullet3: Pre-applied adhesive stays stuck, but can be removed
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.partDescription: Battery Cushions 5"x8"
part.bullet1: 1/8” low-density neoprene with pressure sensitive, removable liner on one side that exposes the adhesive for contact
part.bullet2: Pad is oversized so it can be trimmed into a top or bottom pad to fit all applications
part.bullet3: Can be cut into irregular shapes for anti-vibration padding, seat bottoms, dash panels, etc.
part.bullet4: Measures 5” x 8”

part.partDescription: Indian Saddlebag Liners
part.bullet1: Specifically designed to fit the Indian hard saddlebags
part.bullet2: No need for saddlebag organizers; liners feature three storage compartments on top with zipper closures
part.bullet3: Constructed of heavyweight polyester fabric with a PVC internal coating
part.bullet4: Center compartment is made of a see-through mesh for locating items quickly
part.bullet5: Zippers on the outer compartments wrap around two sides for easy access
part.bullet6: Zipper on the main liners wraps around three sides and the lid will flip up, creating an open access for EZ loading and locating items
part.bullet7: Each liner has two 1" handles that can be joined together with hook-and-loop material for easy carrying

part.partDescription: Saddlebag Lining Kit - Black - FL '14-'22
part.bullet1: Easy-to-install kit for Original Equipment hard saddlebags includes everything riders need to line their OEM hard bags and lids with a soft, thick, durable fabric
part.bullet2: Pliable, stretchable material fits easily into the tight corners of your bags for a professional fit and finish
part.bullet3: Pre-applied adhesive stays stuck, but can be removed

part.partDescription: Front/Tank Seat Bracket - FXR
part.bullet1: Lets you convert any FXR model's hinged seat to a one-piece seat that does not hinge (same as the FXR Super Glide models)
part.bullet2: A beautiful reproduction of the OEM bracket found on Super Glide models
part.bullet3: Can also be used on Softail and various XL models for custom seat mounting
part.bullet4: Made in the U.S.A.

part.partDescription: Seat Display Stand
part.bullet1: Drag Specialties Seat display stand will hold four seats
part.bullet2: Black powder-coated 4-way steel frame with a semi-gloss finish
part.bullet3: Seats are displayed vertically by the rear seat tab which includes about 95% of our seat applications
part.bullet4: Seats without the rear tab will need to be displayed in a way that will not damage the seat
part.bullet6: Hooks are adjustable 12” in 2” increments
part.bullet7: Four vertical supports adjust easily from 53½” to 65½” to accommodate different seat lengths
part.bullet8: Stand has a 36" x 36" footprint and six floor-leveling pads to allow maximum stability
part.bullet9: Includes header sign that is printed on both sides
